title: [Skyship, Processing]
description: Twin vats carved from stone rise from the metal floor on opposite sides of the area.  Each vat is fronted by a broad glaes panel that, while somewhat opaque, is translucent enough to make out the contents that float in a cloudy liquid.   The first vat contains humanoid figures in varying states of decomposition.  The second is filled with loose bits of flesh-stripped bone.  Runic symbols are drawn in a mix of wax and blood on the sides of these vats, flanking the glaes panels, and across the ground.
